title: Datadog (DDOG) Stock Soars 30% on Record-Breaking Q1 2026 Results
text: Datadog Stock Performance on Record Q1 Results. Stock Surge: Datadog stock soared approximately 30 percent following the announcement of record-breaking Q1 2026 results. Revenue Milestone: The company reached the historic 1 billion quarterly revenue mark for the first time in company history. Financial Highlights: Q1 2026 demonstrated exceptional performance with revenue of 1.01 billion representing 32 percent year-over-year growth. EPS of 0.60 significantly exceeded Wall Street expectations. Customer Expansion: The company reported approximately 4,550 customers with 100,000 plus ARR marking continued expansion of its high-value customer base. AI Contribution: A significant portion of growth was attributed to AI-related customers and workloads as the company capitalized on the growing demand for AI infrastructure monitoring. Analyst Reaction: Following the results multiple analysts raised their price targets reflecting confidence in Datadog's growth trajectory and AI market opportunity. Market Impact: The stock surge also lifted the broader software sector as investors sought exposure to companies benefiting from AI adoption.
